test_scroll.description: Scroll inside the box to feel current settings.

anim_time.title: Animation time
anim_time.desc: How long each scroll movement lasts

accel_window.title: Acceleration window
accel_window.desc: Notches within this window stack momentum

tail_ratio.title: Tail to head ratio
tail_ratio.desc: Higher values give a sharper ease-out curve

easing_toggle.title: Smooth easing
easing_toggle.desc: Apply easing curve to each scroll movement

horizontal_smoothness.title: Smooth horizontal scrolling
horizontal_smoothness.desc: Apply smoothing to tilt-wheel and Shift+wheel scrolls

shift_horizontal.title: Shift converts to horizontal
shift_horizontal.desc: Holding Shift while scrolling becomes horizontal scroll

global_hotkey.title: Global hotkey
global_hotkey.desc: Press the chosen combination anywhere to toggle smooth scrolling

hotkey_accelerator.title: Hotkey combination
hotkey_accelerator.desc: Click and press the keys you want to use

start_minimized.title: Start minimized to tray
start_minimized.desc: Hide the settings window on launch

theme.title: Theme
theme.desc: Light, dark, or follow the system

excluded.empty: No apps excluded. Smooth scrolling is active everywhere.

dialog.title: Exclude an app
dialog.desc: Pick a running app or type its process name (without .exe).

profiles.description: Custom scroll settings you can assign to specific apps.
profiles.empty: No custom profiles yet. Create one to fine-tune scroll behavior per app.
profiles.delete_confirm_desc: This profile will be removed permanently. Apps assigned to it must be unassigned first.

create_dialog.title: Create profile
create_dialog.desc: Give your new profile a name. You can edit its settings next.

field.name: Profile name
field.name_desc: A friendly label shown in the app list

app_profiles.description: Choose how SmoothScroll behaves in specific apps.
app_profiles.empty: No per-app overrides. All apps use your global settings.

dialog.title: Assign profile to app
dialog.desc: Pick the profile to use, then choose which app to assign it to.

errors.excluded_add_failed: Failed to add app to excluded list
errors.excluded_remove_failed: Failed to remove app from excluded list
errors.profile_in_use: Cannot delete: profile is assigned to {{count}} app
errors.profile_in_use_plural: Cannot delete: profile is assigned to {{count}} apps
errors.app_profile_assign_failed: Failed to assign profile to app

about.author: Author
about.up_to_date: You are running the latest version.

forced_update.title: Update required
forced_update.description: A new version is available. You must update SmoothScroll to continue using it. (Current: v{{current}} → New: v{{latest}})
